name: Mount Apo
description: The highest peak in the Philippines at 2,954 meters. A challenging trek through diverse ecosystems from tropical rainforest to mossy forest, with breathtaking views of Mindanao.

name: Enchanted River
description: A mesmerizing deep spring river with crystal-clear blue water that seems to glow. The source of the river remains a mystery, making it one of Mindanao's most magical places.

name: Cloud 9 Siargao
description: World-famous surfing spot known for its powerful hollow waves. The iconic boardwalk and viewing deck offer spectacular views of surfers riding the waves.

name: Lake Sebu
description: Home of the T'boli people, this highland lake area features seven interconnected lakes, stunning waterfalls, and rich indigenous culture. Experience traditional t'nalak weaving.

name: Dahican Beach
description: A pristine 7-kilometer stretch of fine sand beach famous for skimboarding. The beach is also a nesting site for endangered sea turtles, protected by the local community.

name: Tinuy-an Falls
description: Known as the 'Niagara Falls of the Philippines', this majestic curtain waterfall has multiple tiers and is surrounded by lush tropical vegetation.

name: Camiguin Island
description: The 'Island Born of Fire' with more volcanoes per square kilometer than any other island. Features cold springs, waterfalls, and the famous sunken cemetery.

name: Philippine Eagle Center
description: Home of the critically endangered Philippine Eagle. This conservation center lets you see these majestic birds up close and learn about efforts to save them.
